ocr_findings: Only the CSS term + definition is promoted to leaves; the surrounding HTML/XML table and CSS code example in OCR are correctly attributed to other pages / not duplicated here.
Definition 'Webページのデザインやレイアウトを指定する言語' + '通常、先述したHTMLとCSSの2つの言語で作成' captured intact.
translation_findings: ZH '层叠样式表（CSS）' surface keeps both expansion + acronym; EN 'CSS (Cascading Style Sheets)' keeps same convention.
ZH '用于指定Web页面设计和布局的语言' + EN 'A language used to specify the design and layout of web pages' both faithful and fluent. No choice markers.
